Container.Name: nudgarr
Container.Overview: Nudgarr keeps your Radarr and Sonarr libraries improving automatically — scheduling searches for missing content and quality upgrades so you don't have to. Runs on a configurable cron schedule or on demand. Supports multiple Radarr and Sonarr instances independently. Rate-limiting built in via cooldowns, batch size, sleep, and jitter to keep your indexers happy. Features include: Cutoff Unmet searches, Backlog Nudges for missing content, auto-exclusion of titles that never download, confirmed import tracking with turnaround times, tag and quality profile filters per instance, per-instance overrides for different cooldowns and caps, Apprise push notifications, and a full mobile UI that works in portrait and landscape.

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Change if 8085 is already in use.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Path to your Nudgarr config and data files.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for cron schedule. e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London. If not set, defaults to UTC. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID to run Nudgarr as. Match your Unraid user.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run Nudgarr as. Match your Unraid group.

Config.Name: SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. A persistent key is automatically created and saved to /config/nudgarr-secret.key on first start. Only set this if you want to manage the key yourself.
